ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Lexus Granito (India) Limited has filed its quarterly compliance certificate under SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, confirming that the regulation is not applicable to the company. This is due to all shares being held in dematerialized form, with no requests for rematerialisation received during the period. This indicates efficient and modern share management, simplifying share transfers and reducing risks, with no immediate red flags identified.
